summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SignalStack/Tradovate webhook integration for trading dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend SignalStack modal functionality working correctly. Order submission, history tracking, and statistics display all functional.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/signalstack/symbols returns Tradovate symbol mappings for all symbols
Backend API /api/signalstack/config GET returns saved webhook configuration
Backend API /api/signalstack/send-order sends order to SignalStack webhook (returns success/error status)
Backend API /api/signalstack/orders returns order history with proper pagination
Backend API /api/signalstack/orders/stats returns order statistics (total, success, failed counts)
Frontend SignalStack button in header opens modal correctly
Frontend modal shows order form with symbol selection and Tradovate mapping
Frontend modal shows quantity input field (working)
Frontend modal shows order type selection (market, limit, stop, stop_limit)
Frontend modal shows limit price input when limit/stop_limit selected
Frontend modal shows stop price input when stop/stop_limit selected
Frontend modal shows BUY and SELL buttons (both clickable)
Frontend modal shows recent orders list with order details and status
Frontend modal shows order statistics (Total: 2, Success: 0, Failed: 2)
Frontend modal shows webhook configuration URL
Frontend modal shows 'Send Signal' button when active signal present (70% conf SHORT signal)
Frontend symbol switching updates Tradovate mappings correctly (MNQ->MNQM26, MES->MESM26)
Frontend modal close functionality works properly
Order error status correctly shows when market closed (expected Tradovate behavior)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all SignalStack modal components and interactions working)
